sentence: 这个老手艺渐渐没落，会的人越来越少了。
pinyin: Zhè ge lǎo shǒu yì jiàn jiàn mò luò, huì de rén yuè lái yuè shǎo le.
english: This old craft is gradually declining, and fewer and fewer people know it.

sentence: 她从小就梦想成为一名宇航员。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng chéngwéi yī míng yǔhángyuán.
english: She has dreamed of becoming an astronaut since childhood.

sentence: 我在本子上记下了今天的安排。
pinyin: Wǒ zài běn zi shàng jì xià le jīn tiān de ān pái.
english: I wrote down today's schedule in my notebook.

meaning: 1. sleeveless garment (vest, waistcoat, singlet, tank top etc); 2. CL:
sentence: 天气太热了，他只穿了件背心。
pinyin: Tiān qì tài rè le, tā zhǐ chuān le jiàn bèi xīn.
english: It was too hot, so he just wore a tank top.

meaning: 1. (physics) inertia; 2. (fig.) force of habit; 3. tendency to do thin
sentence: 他早上总是惯性地先刷手机。
pinyin: Tā zǎoshang zǒng shì guànxìng de xiān shuā shǒujī.
english: Every morning he habitually checks his phone first out of force of habit.

meaning: 1. to hide oneself; 2. invisible (person or online status)
sentence: 他在聊天软件上把状态设成了隐身。
pinyin: Tā zài liáotiān ruǎnjiàn shàng bǎ zhuàngtài shè chéng le yǐnshēn.
english: He set his status to invisible on the chat app.

sentence: 这道菜加了很多香料，味道很浓。
pinyin: Zhè dào cài jiā le hěn duō xiāngliào, wèidào hěn nóng.
english: This dish has a lot of spices added, so the flavor is very rich.

meaning: 1. to open access; 2. to establish contact; 3. to remove a block; 4. t
sentence: 他打了好几次才打通那个电话。
pinyin: Tā dǎ le hǎo jǐ cì cái dǎtōng nà gè diànhuà.
english: He tried several times before he finally got through on that call.

meaning: 1. spearhead; 2. barb; 3. an attack or criticism
sentence: 大家把矛头指向了那家问题企业。
pinyin: Dàjiā bǎ máotóu zhǐxiàngle nà jiā wèntí qǐyè.
english: Everyone directed their criticism at that problem company.

sentence: 搜救队连夜搜寻失联者。
pinyin: Sōujiù duì liányè sōuxún shīlián zhě.
english: The search and rescue team searched through the night for the missing person.

sentence: 清明节我们去祭拜祖宗。
pinyin: Qīngmíng jié wǒmen qù jìbài zǔzōng.
english: We go to pay respects to our ancestors during the Qingming Festival.

sentence: 请把这篇文章分成几个段落。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ zhè piān wén zhāng fēn chéng jǐ gè duàn luò.
english: Please divide this article into a few paragraphs.

sentence: 这套瓷器是外婆留下来的。
pinyin: Zhè tào cíqì shì wàipó liú xià lái de.
english: This set of porcelain was left behind by my grandmother.

sentence: 扫一下这个二维码就能加入群组。
pinyin: Sǎo yīxià zhège èr wéi mǎ jiù néng jiārù qúnzǔ.
english: Just scan this QR code and you can join the group.

sentence: 他用摄像机记录了整个婚礼。
pinyin: Tā yòng shèxiàngjī jìlù le zhěnggè hūnlǐ.
english: He filmed the entire wedding with a video camera.

sentence: 厨房的水管漏水了，需要修一下。
pinyin: Chúfáng de shuǐguǎn lòushuǐ le, xūyào xiū yīxià.
english: The kitchen water pipe is leaking and needs to be repaired.

sentence: 舰长下令全员进入战备状态。
pinyin: Jiànzhǎng xiàlìng quányuán jìnrù zhànbèi zhuàngtài.
english: The captain ordered all crew members to go to battle stations.

meaning: 1. repertoire; 2. list of plays or operas
sentence: 这个剧团今年推出了三个新剧目。
pinyin: Zhège jùtuán jīnnián tuīchū le sān gè xīn jùmù.
english: This theater troupe launched three new productions this year.

sentence: 服务器负载过高，网站访问变慢了。
pinyin: Fúwùqì fùzài guò gāo, wǎngzhàn fǎngwèn biàn màn le.
english: The server load is too high, and the website has slowed down.

sentence: 工厂排放的污染物对河流影响很大。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng páifàng de wūrǎnwù duì héliú yǐngxiǎng hěn dà.
english: Pollutants discharged by factories have a major impact on rivers.

meaning: 1. travel time; 2. expected time for a car journey
sentence: 从这里到机场大约需要四十分钟车程。
pinyin: Cóng zhèlǐ dào jīchǎng dàyuē xūyào sìshí fēnzhōng chēchéng.
english: It takes about forty minutes of travel time from here to the airport.

sentence: 学校开设了预防性疾病的健康课。
pinyin: Xuéxiào kāishè le yùfáng xìng jíbìng de jiànkāng kè.
english: The school offers a health class on preventing sexually transmitted diseases.

sentence: 他在股价低点时买入了不少股票。
pinyin: Tā zài gǔjià dīdiǎn shí mǎirù le bù shǎo gǔpiào.
english: He bought quite a few stocks when the share price was at its lowest.

meaning: 1. business school; 2. university of business studies
sentence: 她考上了一所知名商学院的研究生。
pinyin: Tā kǎo shàng le yī suǒ zhīmíng shāngxuéyuàn de yánjiūshēng.
english: She was admitted to a well-known business school's graduate program.

sentence: 公司今年的净利润比去年增加了两成。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián de jìng lìrùn bǐ qùnián zēngjiā le liǎng chéng.
english: The company's net profit this year increased by 20% compared to last year.

meaning: 1. simplified form of Chinese characters, as opposed to traditional fo
sentence: 这本书同时出版了简体和繁体两个版本。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū tóngshí chūbǎn le jiǎntǐ hé fántǐ liǎng gè bǎnběn.
english: This book was published simultaneously in both simplified and traditional Chinese versions.

meaning: arms and legs; the four limbs of the body
sentence: 每天运动可以让四肢更有力量。
pinyin: Měitiān yùndòng kěyǐ ràng sìzhī gèng yǒu lìliàng.
english: Exercising every day can make your limbs stronger.

sentence: 下午有零星小雨，出门记得带伞。
pinyin: Xiàwǔ yǒu língxīng xiǎoyǔ, chūmén jìde dài sǎn.
english: There will be scattered light rain in the afternoon; remember to bring an umbrella.

sentence: 这套家具的设计很有美感。
pinyin: Zhè tào jiājù de shèjì hěn yǒu měigǎn.
english: The design of this furniture set has a great sense of beauty.

sentence: 所有的监控屏幕都集中在控制室里。
pinyin: Suǒyǒu de jiānkòng píngmù dōu jízhōng zài kòngzhìshì lǐ.
english: All the monitoring screens are concentrated in the control room.

sentence: 他立了功，军衔从上尉升到了少校。
pinyin: Tā lì le gōng, jūnxián cóng shàngwèi shēng dào le shǎoxiào.
english: He distinguished himself in service and his rank was promoted from captain to major.

sentence: 广场中央立着一座大理石塑像。
pinyin: Guǎngchǎng zhōngyāng lì zhe yī zuò dàlǐshí sùxiàng.
english: A marble statue stands in the center of the square.

meaning: 1. to be discharged from military service
sentence: 他退伍后回到家乡开了一家小餐馆。
pinyin: Tā tuìwǔ hòu huídào jiāxiāng kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cānguǎn.
english: After being discharged from the military, he returned to his hometown and opened a small restaurant.

sentence: 这条航道水深，适合大型船只通行。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo hángdào shuǐ shēn, shìhé dàxíng chuánzhī tōngxíng.
english: This waterway is deep and suitable for large vessels to pass through.

meaning: 1. to serve in the army; 2. to be a soldier
sentence: 他十八岁就去当兵了，在部队待了五年。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù qù dāngbīng le, zài bùduì dāi le wǔ nián.
english: He enlisted in the army at eighteen and spent five years in the military.

sentence: 这篇文章里有几处明显的谬误。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng lǐ yǒu jǐ chù míngxiǎn de miùwù.
english: There are several obvious errors in this article.

meaning: 1. to occur at the same time (of two things); 2. to be mingled; 3. to
sentence: 那天风雪交加，我们只好待在家里。
pinyin: Nà tiān fēng xuě jiāo jiā, wǒmen zhǐhǎo dāi zài jiā lǐ.
english: That day there was a storm of wind and snow, so we had no choice but to stay home.

sentence: 工人们正在装配新型发动机。
pinyin: Gōngrénmen zhèngzài zhuāngpèi xīnxíng fādòngjī.
english: The workers are assembling the new engine.

sentence: 这款手机有内置的翻译功能。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī yǒu nèizhì de fānyì gōngnéng.
english: This phone has a built-in translation feature.

sentence: 货车满载着蔬菜驶向市场。
pinyin: Huòchē mǎn zài zhe shūcài shǐ xiàng shìchǎng.
english: The truck was fully loaded with vegetables heading to the market.

sentence: 纪录片里的炮火场面让人震惊。
pinyin: Jìlùpiàn lǐ de pàohuǒ chǎngmiàn ràng rén zhènjīng.
english: The artillery fire scenes in the documentary were shocking.

sentence: 这个传感器能侦测到微小的气体泄漏。
pinyin: Zhège chuángǎnqì néng zhēncè dào wēixiǎo de qìtǐ xìlòu.
english: This sensor can detect even tiny gas leaks.

sentence: 我们买了白色涂料来粉刷客厅。
pinyin: Wǒmen mǎi le báisè túliào lái fěnshuā kètīng.
english: We bought white paint to repaint the living room.

meaning: 1. to withdraw; 2. to leave; 3. to retreat; 4. to pull out
sentence: 公司决定撤出那个亏损的市场。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng chèchū nàge kuīsǔn de shìchǎng.
english: The company decided to withdraw from that loss-making market.

sentence: 印刷机上的罗拉需要定期清洁。
pinyin: Yìnshuājī shàng de luólā xūyào dìngqī qīngjié.
english: The rollers on the printing machine need to be cleaned regularly.

meaning: 1. to access (a network); 2. to insert (a plug) into (a socket)
sentence: 你可以把手机接入这个无线网络。
pinyin: Nǐ kěyǐ bǎ shǒujī jiērù zhège wúxiàn wǎngluò.
english: You can connect your phone to this wireless network.

sentence: 他看起来很忙，实则什么都没做。
pinyin: Tā kànqǐlái hěn máng, shízé shénme dōu méi zuò.
english: He looks very busy, but in fact he hasn't done anything.

sentence: 妈妈喜欢听八十年代的老歌。
pinyin: Māma xǐhuān tīng bāshí niándài de lǎogē.
english: Mom loves listening to oldies from the eighties.

sentence: 这款产品的可靠性经过了严格测试。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn chǎnpǐn de kěkàoxìng jīngguò le yángé cèshì.
english: The reliability of this product has been rigorously tested.

sentence: 警方终于逮捕了那名杀人犯。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng zhōngyú dàibǔ le nà míng shārénfàn.
english: The police finally arrested that murderer.
